title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Upgraded to Buy: Here's What You Should Know
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

title: 14 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including A Soon To Be King
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 12.4% and a median increase of 10.3%. I've tracked 282 increases in 2022, 211 increases in Q1 2022, and 71 in Q2.

title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Teams Up With Wiliot to Enhance IoT
text: Avery Dennison's (AVY) partnership helps accelerate the manufacturing capacity of Wiliot tags significantly.

title: Avery Dennison and Wiliot Announce Strategic Partnership to Build and Scale the Future of the Internet of Things
text: MENTOR, Ohio & SAN DIEGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY), the world's largest provider of RFID and digital ID solutions, and Wiliot, the Internet of Things pioneer, today announced a strategic partnership dedicated to scaling the IoT to the next level, creating a new era of IoT that benefits people and the planet. title: Here's Why Avery Dennison (AVY) is an Attractive Bet Now
text: Stellar first-quarter 2022 results, investment in high-value products, pricing actions and positive growth prospects make Avery Dennison (AVY) a solid investment option.
